prerequisites: A Merge account with access to the Merge dashboard at app.merge.dev.
A production API key generated in the Merge dashboard (used as the api_token).
At least one Linked Account created through Merge Link, which provides its account_token (used as the account_token).
A start_date marking the earliest record timestamp from which to begin syncing data.

authMethods.name: Merge API key (Authorization: Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Maps to the api_token secret field. Merge authenticates platform requests with your production API key sent as an `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header. Find or regenerate the key in the Merge dashboard at app.merge.dev/keys.

authMethods.name: Linked Account token (X-Account-Token)
authMethods.summary: Maps to the account_token secret field. Each end user's integration is a Linked Account identified by its account token, sent as the `X-Account-Token` header. The token is shown on the Linked Account's page in the Merge dashboard after the end user completes the Merge Link flow.

setupSteps.title: Generate your Merge API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Merge dashboard at app.merge.dev and open the API Keys page (app.merge.dev/keys). Copy your production API key. This value is the connector's api_token and is sent to Merge as the `Authorization: Bearer` header on every request.

setupSteps.title: Obtain a Linked Account token
setupSteps.body: Create or open a Linked Account in the Merge dashboard. After the end user completes the Merge Link authentication flow, copy the account token shown on that Linked Account's page. This value is the connector's account_token and is sent to Merge as the `X-Account-Token` header to scope requests to that end user's data.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the required start_date. The connector uses it as the earliest record timestamp from which to begin syncing data; records older than this date are not replicated.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the api_token, the account_token, and the start_date into the connector configuration. Both tokens are secret. With all three fields set, the connector can authenticate to the Merge Unified API and begin replication.

sources.title: Merge Knowledge Base overview (unified API, rate limits per account_token)
